title: Experimental status of `buildah-source` subcommand
body:
The docs for buildah-source warn that:
https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/daf7143b89a4cb9c34ac05722e8a8fd945930dc4/docs/buildah-source.1.md?plain=1#L15-L16

According to the [history of source.go](https://github.com/containers/buildah/commits/main/cmd/buildah/source.go), It seems like there haven't been many changes lately.

Can buildah-source be considered mature, with no major changes planned for the near future or should it still be considered experimental?

comments.body: Personally, I think its use cases are better served by artifacts, and discourage its use.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
My question is answered. I'm fine with closing this if you are too
